subcodes.first_line: This is a Book that speaketh the truth and guideth men unto the celestial dominion of transcendent glory, and God hath made it a testimony from [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب ینطق بالحق و یهدی الناس الی جبروت عز علیا و قد جعله الله حجه من
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @Manifestation of God as mediator, @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
